supplies.title: RS2 Math Set
supplies.note: A Judy Clock is not included, but highly recommended. These can be purchased at teacher supply stores.
supplies.maySub: the RS2 Math Set Super Saver, which comes with the hard-to-find special items for the second edition curriculum.  Some of the missing items may be obtained and printed from the program's downloadable files. Additionally, you will need to find substitutions, purchase individual items, or skip lessons occasionally.
